block_02:
Expecting a price shift at the start of the next trading day?
Set up for a trade to launch immediately once the market opens.
block_05: Suppose a disappointing company Earnings Report goes live after the market’s close. All signs point to their stock opening lower.
block_06: You go to the IQ Option trading platform, pick a CFD for that company’s stock and choose to Buy or Sell at the opening price.
block_07: Placing a trading order at the opening price lets you take advantage of dramatic price shifts happening at the start of the session.
